Bash(git -C "D:/prod_projects/etoir-landing" add .gitignore landing/blog/cmms-vs-excel/index.html landing/blog/index.html landing/blog/kak-vnedrit-toir-sistemu/index.html landing/blog/zachem-avtomatizirovat-toir/index.html landing/index.html landing/sitemap.xml nginx/etoir.conf docs/SEO-TODO.md landing/images/AI.webp landing/images/assets.webp landing/images/dash.webp landing/images/og-image.webp landing/images/orders.webp landing/images/top-dash.webp landing/rss.xml landing/styles.css)

PowerShell($urls = @\('https://etoir.ru/blog/cmms-vs-excel/','https://etoir.ru/blog/cmms-vs-excel/index.html','https://etoir.ru/blog/','https://etoir.ru/sitemap.xml'\); foreach \($u in $urls\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -MaximumRedirection 5 -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; "$u -> $\($r.StatusCode\), $\($r.RawContentLength\) bytes, ct=$\($r.Headers['Content-Type']\)" } catch { "$u -> ERR $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })
